channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Bitcoin "wastes energy." XRP has declared war on real cryptocurrency! — 27 replies — 47.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Bitcoin "wastes energy." XRP has declared war on real cryptocurrency!

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-05-18 17:36 UTC

OP

When did this happen?? I thought Ripple banking partners were just full of shit, liars, and purposely deceitful!

They are now saying real consensus mechanisms are "wasting energy!" XRP has 130 validators, VETTED BY THEM, WITH BULLSHIT CONSENSUS SOFTWARE.

Early replies (first 3)

62231653
> we have incentive to do this thing
> totally btc is bad because of le bad energy use!!

62231656
>>62231647

KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62231682
I pray something awful happens to this company

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62231978
>>62231647
but are they wrong doe??

62232008
>>62231978

Yes

62232419
>>62231647
>They are now saying real consensus mechanisms are "wasting energy!" XRP has 130 validators, VETTED BY THEM, WITH BULLSHIT CONSENSUS SOFTWARE

6% up btw
Touch grass fudcuck

62232757
>>62231647
This isn't a bad thing.
Bitcoin is more useful than the whole country of Argentina.
Maybe we should cut power to Argentina since they don't produce much of a value.

62232870
>>62231647
Kaboom

62233780
>>62231647
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62236240
>>62231647
KABOOOOOM

62236298
>>62232757
this

62237114
>>62231647
BOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62237117
>>62232419
And down again BOOOM

62237547
>>62232757
>>62236298
Argentina is the world's fifth largest beef producer, btc depending in who you ask, is either a shittier version of xmr, or le digital gold (i.e. fucking useless).

62237554
>>62237547
>xmr

just admit you are all in on xmr

62237597
>>62237554
I own exactly 0 (zero) crypto currency.

62238160
>>62231647
KABOOOOOOOOOOOM

62238200
>>62231647
BOOOOOOOM

62238940
So bullish XRP

62241051
>>62231647
KABOOOOOOOOOOOM

62241193
>>62231647
one of the most corrupt business, luckily the market shows them no mercy because it excels at detecting that

62242372
>>62231647
>>62231656

62243568
>>62231647
>xrp wages war on x y z!
Xrp isn't waging a war on anything except their bagholders
This is how their model operates
>sell premined shitcoin to retards and do give-aways to institutions for pr / marketing purposes, never actually gets used
>buy actual financial products for themselves which don't involve their premined shitcoin
>ripple private stock goes up

62243826
xlm/xrp and bitcoin are both vying for the spot of the digital currency that is used by the people.

62244141
>>62231647
BItcoin is a machine that turns energy into bankers tears. What could be more essential?

62244144
>>62243568
KaBOOOOOOOOOOOOM LINK

62246247
KABOOOOOOOOM

$9

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-05-18 17:46 UTC

OP

one Turkish gooner and a small Balkan nation (Bulgaria) completely destroyed a globohomo WEF approved crypto cult.

The antichrist isn’t as strong as he wants you to believe

>>62243976
Eth is not allowed to pump!

62244104
>>62243976
Hey
Basically I'm just not gonna sell them (my LINK tokens!)
I know.... UGH I know..... I'm sorry!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
It's just that I'm not gonna sell is all
HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

62244378
>>62244104
Hey
Basically I'm just not gonna buy the cuckold token (LINK)
I know.... UGH I know..... I'm sorry!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
It's just that I'm not gonna buy is all
HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62244698
KABOOOOOOOM LINK BABY

62244725
kek another thread, you fuddies are assmad

62244731
>>62244725
we're jealous of your huge gains over the past 6 years :)

62246087
>>62243976
Adem seriously won. He defeated the avocados

62246112
>>62243976
This but for incels.

62246166
Ever since the layer zero debacle fuddies have been going extra hard. Interesting coincidence

62246227
>>62246166
I nooticed too
Turns out fuddies are paid for by "competitors" after all

62246281
>>62244731
This is weird FUD cause I bought in 2023 and I'm still doing pretty good, I sold a little bit at 20$.

62246287
>>62246166
That is coincidental timing

item.title: KEK MICROSOFT — 22 replies — 18.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
KEK MICROSOFT

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-05-18 16:58 UTC

OP

KEK MICROSOFT

Early replies (first 3)

62242596
>>62242594
Fake news. Doesn't he own Microsoft? As far as I know that means you can't sell the stock since it's literally your company.

62242597
Just in time before a windows defender exploit

62242598
>>62242594
Micropenis lel, didnt read btw.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62242604
>>62242594
>3bn

who cares? it has like a 3T market cap, 3bn is literally nothing and doesnt matter

62242615
>>62242596
>Doesn't he own Microsoft?
No

62242641
>>62242594
Good riddance.
Ever since bill gaytes started stock dumping, it has been pumping.
Steve Ballmer held all his stock and he's now far richer than Billy boy.

62242765
>>62242596
It's a public company you tard

62242784
>>62242596
Nope. It's real.

https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/bill-gates-just-did-unthinkable-132955202.html

>The Bill Gates Foundation Trust exited its final position by selling all remaining shares after reducing holdings from 28.5M to zero shares, a move driven by portfolio diversification, valuation optimization, and funding obligations rather than confidence loss.

>Gates’ complete exit from Microsoft reflects rational asset allocation for a charitable foundation managing liquidity needs and concentration risk, not a loss of faith in Microsoft’s AI-driven business transformation and ability to convert enterprise technology investments into recurring revenue.

Methinks they doth protest too much.

62242804
1. Why did he do that?
2. What does it mean for the company's future and its stocks?

62242984
>jeet CEO
the new IBM
zero

62242991
>>62242804
I heard co-pilot licenses are about to go up like 15x the price. Maybe the AI bubble is about to pop.

62243539
>>62242594
UH MICROJEET BROS??

62243590
>>62242596
Holy shit how can people so dumb come and post on a finance board. Truly shows why this place sucks.

62243606
>>62243590
>newfag can’t decipher obvious b8 and has a Redditor meltdown

62243628
>>62243606
No it's not bait, this board is pretty low. I have 16 filtered threads right now, people are really low IQ here. Shame.

62243736
>>62243590
this board was better in 2018 when alt seasoned happened

62243990
>>62242604
Market cap doesn’t = liquidity. All that matters is liquidity. It’s why some shit coin can be worth 100 million but if liquidity is low some dude could sell 1 million dollars and price goes down 30% reducing market cap by 30 million with a 1 million sell order

62244084
>>62243628
16kek, i have 34, prolly only lankshit.

62244361
>>62242991
bullshit

the prices of m365 copilot licences are decreasing since 2023

t. copilot security engineer

62244369
>>62242596
Yes, he owns 100% shares, writes 100% of the code and if you call the IT support, the guy with the indian accent is actually him.

62245917
>>62244361
Not sure if trolling or intentional misinformation.

62246079
>>62243590
>Holy shit
back you go

ZE GREAT REZET IS UPON US

Early replies (first 3)

62241566

62241612
>>62241566

62241637
>>62241566
>Bitcoin will SURELY pump during this bear market
lol okay newfag

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62241643
>>62241559
My hairdresser and I are stacking cash and waiting patiently for Ben to call the bottom in red octover

62241715
>>62241612
The only difference is the temporal variable. Everything else is more or less the same.

62241772
>>62241715
what

62243104
It's scary how Ben was 100% right, bros. $40k is inevitable.

62243154
Listen to bald guy

62246223
HERE EET COMEZ

EET IZ REZETTING

item.title: TWENTY (20) LINK fuddie threads in the catalog — 37 replies — 75.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
TWENTY (20) LINK fuddie threads in the catalog

Open thread • Replies: 37 • Updated: 2026-05-18 17:41 UTC

OP

Why are they so riled up?

Early replies (first 3)

62244594
>they

its a dysgenic thing, who knows

62244608
Boom status?

62244615
>>62244587
You do know that those threads are made by link holders right?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62244701
>>62244594
>>62244630
>>62244653
the cuckolds of crypto are SEETHING lol

62244764
>>62244701
>20 threads crying about Link holders
>1 thread crying about Link fudders

"these are the same thing"

62244781
>>62244764
reparashuns after 9 years of spamming this useless shitcoin

62244783
>>62244587
It's a psyop by the jannies, they want a pay rise

62244787
>>62244781
The only spamming came from fuddies. See OP

62244813
>>62244787
>akshually we never spammed Chainlink!
fuck off baggie, i've been here since 2017 and this board was flooded with daily LINK threads

62244820
>>62244813
95% of all Link posting on here has been fud, always. Especially after Google Cloud in the spring of 2019

62244826
>>62244587
If you open a thread about any other coin (for exception of shitty scam coins) they close the thread in 20 minutes.
Meanwhile linkies can open 50 threads.
This makes you understand why this board is dead

62244834
>>62244820
absolutely not true, the "FUD" ramped up when you had a shitty bear market in 2022. Otherwise it was only a handful of negative threads and ALL the others were made by shills

62244846
>>62244834
The fud was exactly as it is now from early 2019 onwards.
In fact, in early 2020 Zeus Capital released a huge compilation of some of the most prevalent /biz/ fud narratives.

62244847
>>62244834
Are these shills in a room with us now?

62244854
>>62244847
sure, there's one>>62244846

62244880
>>62244854
>fuddies spam 20 threads every day
>one linkie brings up early fud spam

"these are the same thing"

62244901
>>62244826
>If you open a thread about any other coin (for exception of shitty scam coins) they close the thread in 20 minutes.
Yeah it's bs
everthing is banned for spam/racism reasons
yet fud niggers can spam the board and it's all ok

62244922
>>62244615
why

62244931
It’s XRP baggies. They came from Reddit back in 2021 or so.

62244945
>>62244931
>It’s XRP baggies.
How do you know?
They seem not to care about anything except for LINK.

62244955
>>62244608
I'm... gonna....
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62244980
>>62244945
The verbose cripple is absolutely one of the resident Link fudders. In fact he's such a massive samefagger too that he's probably larping as multiple resident Link "villains".

62245610
Fuddies why not bump this thread?
Scared much?

62245791
>>62244587
Mental illness and faggotry.

62245798
>>62245610
fuck stinks

>>62245791
fuck stinks

62245832
>>62245791
kekbaggie.

62246039
>>62244587
All link fudders hold link. They were getting excited when it started pumping over $10 but since it crashed theyre all chimping out and lashing out again

62246104
that's great, people are posting about Chainlink more.

62246164
>>62246039
Sure, like the redstone monkey right?

62246168
>>62246039

Sorry about layer zero dude, it sucks to suck

62246257
>>62244980
I haven't seen the wall of text xerpie in a while

Sort of funny when he shows up because you can tell he tries to hold back, but inevitably ends up writing paragraph after paragraph of wordslop

62246264
>>62244587
see
>>62246166

62246271
I didnt contribute to any of the chainlink fud threads but I am certainly happy to see them. /biz/ is healing.

item.title: how do LINK shills refute this? — 42 replies — 30.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
how do LINK shills refute this?

Open thread • Replies: 42 • Updated: 2026-05-18 16:49 UTC

OP

how do LINK shills refute this?

Early replies (first 3)

62240980
>>62240977
Self checked

62240982
>>62240977
cringe CLL meme. price + chart + take the L

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62244013
>>62242019
This. Old /biz/ had mad alpha. The OG /biz/fags were shilling $0.50 ETH and $300 BTC, all the people from that era got stupid rich and quit the board.
What do we have left? A bunch of broke neet schizos and zoomers shilling their dead shitcoin bags.
I dont think I've even seen SanDisk or MU being shilled here besides in the /smg/ general, that and /pmg/ are the only 2 productive threads on this entire shitheap board. /biz/ totally lost its edge after the 2021 bullrun and jeet invasion.
Reddit and x are mogging /biz/ nowadays. Normies are getting rich from tech stocks while /biz/cels are bagholding chainlink from a decade ago and they havent made any gains in years

62244025
>>62244013
link boom
so boom
bullish link
kaBOOOOOOM

62244248
>>62240967
>refute that the crypto market is fake and gay!

We know it is. Take one look at the top 10.
Why do you think crypto price action is up ass creek while stocks are at ATH?

62244357
>>62244013
>while /biz/cels are bagholding chainlink from a decade ago and they havent made any gains in years
speak for yourself you stupid nigger. I have 40k LINK staked since v0.1 and im up 600% ytd in my stock portfolio thanks to semis, memory and photonics.

you dumb pieces of shit are ALWAYS projecting your poorfag spirit onto others. i dont post alpha here cuz i refuse to give crumbs to LINK fudders kek

62244374
>>62244357
your shitcoin is down -85% since 2021. It was the most atrocious investment ever, nobody needs your shitty crumbs about LINK lmao

62244460
>>62244374
Good thing you devoted your entire life to thinking and posting about this all day every day.

62244909
>>62240993
yeah and from the same perspective xrp's chart looks better
should I sell my link and buy that trash instead hmm?

62244910
>>62244909
>yeah and from the same perspective xrp's chart looks better
Incorrect.
LINK has outperformed both BTC and XRP.

62244925
>>62244910
weird how I feel raped even though I'm up 3x still from my dca many years ago and in that same time if I had bought btc instead of link I'd be up ~15x and if I bought xrp I'd be up ~10x
so show me the crazy specific timeframe that link did better
was I supposed to buy ico and sell the top?

62244930
>>62244925
sorry xrp would have been 5x, btc would be like 12-15x

62244939
>>62244013
I'm making money on tech while also holding link. It's not really bag holding because I bought at 30 cent

62244943
>>62244925
>>62244930
LINK has outperformed XRP.
Cope all you want, it's just the facts.

62245194
>>62240980
Act like you belong here fagbag. Self checking is reddit

62245221
>>62244943
kek
full tard detected
>no wonder your in shitlink

62245265
>>62245221
WoW dud you are right!
Just market sold all my stinks!

62245492
>>62244357
>I have 40k LINK staked since v0.1

you're down 1.6 million

>i dont post alpha here

bro you can be honest... you have no alpha

62245509
>>62244943
>LINK has outperformed XRP.

not lately... xrp went 7x in the '25 run whereas link could barely double

it's funny watching the cult gaslight their newer members for not getting in early on the pyramid scheme. really smart community decision to shit all over your investors. then they're shocked there's no new buyers

62245517
>>62245492
You've been spending literal years of your life comparing other people's ROI like this.

62245520
>>62242019
OK link me to anyone with a portfolio anywhere on the entire internet with bnb that's 5 or 6 figures. You can't because they don't exist, this board is trash so what's your alternative, twitter where they openly run scams? Reddit where they're years behind everything (gme started here, reddit only picked it up at the very end)?

62245534
>>62245517
Its because they're comparing their own ROI to what they think they could have had. They all hold link. They're just too dumb to understand the complexity of the market and think its as simple as "someone smarter than me bought the better asset!", as if everyone here could have just bought BNB 6 years ago and been millionaires. When everyone DOES buy, like trumpcoin, it rugs immediately.

62245561
>>62245534
>They're just too dumb to understand the complexity of the market and think its as simple as "someone smarter than me bought the better asset!"
I think it's a lot dumber than that even, they're blaming the project for the market.
Basically pic related.

62245695
>>62244013
How many of the OGs actually held until now?

62245721
With picrel. Image from 3 days ago, but whatever.

62245775
fuck link chuddies

62245782
>>62244013
I'm still here taking a shit from my venice hotel room rn. Link will moon, you will see. It's just taking longer than expected. Which is a golden opportunity for those who missed the others.

62245800
>>62245517
>You've been spending literal years of your life comparing other people's ROI like this.

don't be so dramatic. it's an investment board. calculating gains/losses and opportunity cost is part of the discussion.


>>62245561
>I think it's a lot dumber than that even, they're blaming the project for the market.
>Basically pic related.

i think you have to tell yourself that lie in order to protect your ego. you have to tell yourself there's just no way an investor can't understand your genius play. they would have to be indian scammers to not see it

pretty juvenile thinking but i guess when you're down 5+ years straight and just missed the bull market, you have to come up with something

62245837
>>62245782
Literally nothing will pump this shitcoin, it will suffer the same fate as Kleros, an infinite permableed until a massive -50% wick destroys the spirit of remaining 2017 bagholders.
There are no net new big wallets, same baggies rotating the same bags, pretending staking yield makes up for a chart that looks like a stairway to hell.
Chainlink is one big permissioned, KYC'd, network, nobody with a crypto ethos wants to touch this trash with a 10-foot pole.
The biggest joke? LINK absorbed billions in TVL and still can't match LZ's volume.

62245840
>>62245721
>uncle rico bragging about gains from 7 years ago


bro we get it, you got some chicks' number in high school


the link cult is basically akin to boomers bragging about how they bought a house back in the day for $50k. they've conflated existing during a certain time period with having actual investment skill.

but that's the great thing about investing. even a blind squirrel finds a nut once in a while

62245849
Touch me

62246030
>>62244943
>>62245509
this
what the faggots don't realize is that xrp has had like 11 years for you to buy where you'd still be up and like 2 weeks in 2018 and last year to buy to be down
chainlink has had many more years for you to buy to be down and it's newer than xrp
thankfully I'm not down or I'd hate link (and myself) even more

item.title: THE cuckolds of crypto — 86 replies — 29.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
THE cuckolds of crypto

Open thread • Replies: 86 • Updated: 2026-05-18 15:14 UTC

OP

.

Early replies (first 3)

62238332
Fuck you bitch bastard

62238351
>>62238330
Insert "link" next tim pls, thanks!

62238706
>>62238330
so many Chainlink partnerships!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62242184
>>62242176
>since 2018
since 2021
blind nigga

62242191
simple as

62242193
>>62242184
He’s right you retarded nigger, if you bought Link in September 2017 you got outperformed by BTC. Congrats on being poor

62242204
>>62242193
What if you bought ETH at that same time?

Why doesnt this board have +10 ETH fud threads up all the time

62242205
>>62242193
he's a paid shill, don't even bother
he even fucked up and confused the fiat ATH with sats ATH
total imbecile

62242216
>>62242204
nobody is desperately trying yo convince me that ETH hasn't underperformed, get it now?

62242225
>>62242193
>if you bought Link in September 2017 you got outperformed by BTC
Wrong!
See:
>>62241119
LINK has outperformed BTC,
you can cope as much as you want fuddies
but it's just the facts

62242230
>>62242216
The narrative is that LINK has been worst investment you could have done back in 2017-2018 when ETH has performed 10x worse.

ETH doesnt even have Sergey dumping tokens so how is that possible?

62242249
>>62242225
LINK is sitting comfortably about -30% from its 2018 sats high, sorry but it's simple facts, it has underperformed BTC for almost 8 years now, each and every buy you did after that fact is in the red, and you clinging on to the ICO and Binance listing pump is disingenuous at best
sorry pal, can't argue with reality
>>62242230
you seem confused, that's YOUR cope narrative, that LINK was the only investment you could have made during 2017-18, while everyone else is simply pointing out to you that it's been a trash investment ever since
are you also retarded, like your gaslighting friend, or are you merely pretending?

62242250
>>62242193
>if you bought Link in September 2017 you got outperformed by BTC

LINK price (Sept 2017): $0.10
LINK price now: $9.69
LINK % gains: 9,590%

BTC price (Sept 2017): $4,000
BTC price now: $78,000
BTC % gains: 1,850%

LINK OUTPERFORMED BTC BY: 7,740%

62242252
>>62242249
No i just said that you could have invested in ETH for example

Why does that rile you up? Why arent you spamming catalog full of ai slopped Vitalik pics & ETH/BTC chart?

62242253
>>62242250
>the disingenuous shiller continues to play dumb and engage in shameless gaslighting
honey, the Sept 2017 ATH was $1.50, not $.010
the state of this board

62242258
>>62242252
cool, I'm just saying that LINK has been performing like garbage for almost 8 years, what the fuck is YOUR problem?

62242267
>>62242258
But LINK has literally outperformed BTC since 2018?

And pretty much the whole market

62242270
>>62242267
LINK is literally down from it's 2018 high in sats???
can you read a fucking chart bro?

62242275
>>62242253
>honey, the Sept 2017 ATH was $1.50
wtf are you smoking?

62242278
>>62242270
But it literally isnt? What kind of charts are you looking at

Anyway i literally couldnt care less, never selling

62242280
>>62242278
He's just making stuff up now it seems
lmao I broke the fuddie bot

62242285
keep embarrassing yourselves, that woll surely convince people to buy your heavy bags

62242297
>>62242285
No one here sold when it literally dumped to 0.00001 , what are you trying to achieve?

62242324
>>62242285
You don't need to buy Link. Actually I am totally happy currently with people not buying Link. I wish the price would crash even harder now that I am not a poorfag student anymore and have the money to buy more.
Chances are high I will still be very wealthy in a few years while you will stay a dumb useless shitskin anyway sorrounded by other shitskins, without any prospects in your pathetic life other than posting shit online for a few cents a day.

62242431
>>62242116
rattled plus whiter than you, moroccan transplant
still not posting portfolio huh? show us how you picked all the "winners" (lol) from 2017, go ahead

62242727
>>62238330
sirgay plz pump this shit already
i can't w8 any longer

62243376
>>62242431

He's a sandnigger who is obsessed with nigger dicks, and is such a gooner that it makes him suicidal

62244078
>>62243376

62244381
>>62242431
>>62243376

He WON

62244443
I'm... KABOOOOOOMING

62244446
>>62244443

62244554
>>62239124

item.title: Shouldn`t ASML had grow more than any other tech stock because they are the bottleneck and can`t be replace by any other… — 21 replies — 28.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Shouldn`t ASML had grow more than any other tech stock because they are the bottleneck and can`t be replace by any other…

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-05-18 17:27 UTC

OP

Shouldn`t ASML had grow more than any other tech stock because they are the bottleneck and can`t be replace by any other?

They make 90% of the machines that make most of the chips and memories fueling the AI boom.

Early replies (first 3)

62241927
They’re HQ’d in a country that just introduced taxes on unrealized gains.

A lot of institutional investors dont want exposure to the regulatory risks that comes from that kind of retardation.

62241935
>>62241900
scam

62241951
>>62241900
ASML has clearly chosen to raise prices in line with the machines efficiency gains. they could 100x the price but choose not to.

email ASML and ask them.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62242005
>>62241927
FPBP op BTFO

62242008
>>62241927
It should only affect investors living there.

>>62241951
Could be they sue for failing their fiduciaries duties to their shareholders by not maximizing theirs profits?

62242033
>>62242008
>It should only affect investors living there.
The point is that the people who are in charge over there are so terrible at economic policy that it poses a serious future risk to companies that are incorporated there

62242039
>>62242008
contact a corporate lawyer and get the ball rolling

62242066
>>62241900
reminder to invest in Zeiss too, without their optics the whole cardhouse comes down

62242662
>>62242066
>he doesn't know about Elcan

62242720
>>62242066
>reminder to invest in Zeiss too
How? Aren't they private?

62242904
>>62241951
They can't really charge +20 billion for a high NA EUV machine, no.
They have a very small number of customers and they can very much say no if prices get too high. The depreciation of these machines is one of the most important aspects of the operation of semiconductor fabs

62242916
>>62241900
They aren't a current bottleneck, no.
They have a monopoly, yes, on the most important machine in semiconductor fabs, but they make only those. A semi fab has dozens of different high tech machines.
In any case, their machines already are the single largest cost of building a new fab. And customers often just don't buy the latest tech because it's too expensive. Intel didn't buy EUV machines when they were launched in late 2010's. TSMC said they won't buy their high NA EUV machines now because it's not worth the cost.

62242970
>>62241900
every single stocks are over valued

62245404
I work as ASML (NL) and the company is bottlenecked by the amount of talent worldwide. There are all sorts of grants and traineeships and internships here, even for internationals, which is rare in The Netherlands. The problems are:
1. Most "degrees" are utter shit. If it is Dutch/Nordic it is sufficient depending on grades. If it is German/Anglo in 95% of the cases the curriculum or the students are too retarded. If it is like Spanish/French/Italian there is only 1-2% of applicants that are acceptable. Japs/Koreans go to Taiwan/Korea. Chinks are banned. The rest are all dogshit.
2. Most most applicants, even with good grades and good degrees, are brainrotted zoomers. They do not have the capacity to innovate. There is no agency, no self-reflection, or plannign. So they get filtered through the selection process.
3. People that do get through, often fuck off to America. Why stay in The Netherlands and get 5-6keur after 4 years when you can go to the USA and get paid over 120k with ease?
4. Even if you progress to higher salaries, let's say over 100k, then the government will tax you into the ground. From 78k it is a 49,5% income tax rate (exl all other taxes that rape you) So the people that stay at ASML (NL) are typically too lazy to move to America or are forced to work part-time.
5. But what about ASML America? We are forced to send our NL talent to America to keep them in the company. Once we hear a worker bring up ASML America for transfer, we have to create a timeline for them to move otherwise they leave. So the winner after all this is America. It won't surprise me if in the year 2100 of Our Lord 2/3rds of ASML is in the USA

62245431
>>62245404
sounds like ASML doesn't offer good incentives to attract talent.
you'd think that ASML executives would understand that people who devote themselves to higher education and difficult curriculum expect to be paid more than 5-6keur (especially if theyre working on the most important product of the century)
they deserve to lose talent at the fastest rate possible.

62245476
>>62245431
The problem isn't attracting talent, there just isn't enough in it in the world. Every retard in this country and abroad is applying thinking he has a shot. You can get an internship, grant, work-student ship, traineeship all with more perks than any other company.
Also that 5-6k p/m is after 3-4 years. Starting is more like 4200-4800 depending your skillset. (So this is after 5-6 years of studying). 6k is considered a very high salary in the netherlands, modal income is only 48k.

62245510
>>62241900
They can't scale their production enough to meet demand. They're limited and bottle necked.

62245822
>>62241927
Box 3 is a tax on private wealth, not corps. It's not introduced yet either, and will be amended.

62245921
>>62245404
Why not move all ASML to America? Why stay in Netherlands? They would pay almost no taxes there and the salaries would be 3x.

62245950
>>62245404
in 2100 the usa will be in a much worse position than it is now due to the loss of power of the dollar. wealth will be spread out better, and people who stick in NL have a chance to be autistic and curious which is good, the most intelligent employees are not necessarily those who are attracted to money.
it seems your selection process isn't good enough or you're not looking well enough. high amount of retards applying =/= bottleneck of talents

62246197
>>62245404
>need top of the top absolute best applicants with niche skills
>offer them shitty noncompetitive salary
>nobody wants to work for you
>existing workers fuck off to USA as soon as they can
>surprised pikachu face.jpg
I didn't expect dutch to be so retarded.

item.title: There are exactly 21.6 basis points sitting between you and the worst stock market crash in US history. — 24 replies — 11.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
There are exactly 21.6 basis points sitting between you and the worst stock market crash in US history.

Open thread • Replies: 24 • Updated: 2026-05-18 16:08 UTC

OP

There are exactly 21.6 basis points sitting between you and the worst stock market crash in US history.

Early replies (first 3)

62243422
>>62243415
Good, i want sub1500 peso eth finally.

62243423
oh my science, is that my hecking yen carry trade

62243425
Nigga all my money is in xrp nip bonds dont mean shit to me

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62243441
Oh thank God finally

62243443
>>62243415
Yeah no one is panicking here, it's bad for Japan, and the world. 3% is panic, 4% is basically death spiral, but this can easily accelerate. Importantly even if there's no direct or immediate impact on the rest of the world it'll set a tipping point for everywhere else

62243526
>be me
>scared to buy 2 months ago
>wasn't scared to buy the last 2 weeks
Anyway that's how I knew the crash was imminent, because I only feel confident buying at the worst times.

62243545
>>62243415
I don't get it.
What's so bad a gook bond paying 3% a year?

62243608
>>62243545
They're under so much debt at this point that even 3%, 4% basically is unsustainable

62243621
>>62243608
>>62243545
Oh basically so then Japan collapses under hyperinflation, the yen tanks, huge amount of global capital goes bust, huge hurt to their economy which hits everyone. But more importantly that'll instill discipline in the rest of the bond market, which will push loads of countries with shitty debt levels over the brink as well. Domino effect. Global fiat collapse

62243653
>>62243415
Nothing will happen. Just bought more unranium

62243661
>>62243621
Interesting. And what does this mean for my meme coins ?

62243662
>>62243415
I'm doing everything I can to tank america (selling u.s. bonds) and prop up Japan (bought a made in Japan Mazda, japanese knives for my kitchen, japanese stationary, japanese hentai)

62243664
>>62243526
Successfully lured by the jews

62243757
There are exactly 21.2 basis points sitting between you and the worst stock market crash in US history.

62243771
Hell yeah, inflation makes my assets go up, meaning I can borrow more later to buy depressed assets!
Odds on Bitcoin going back to $35k - $40k by October?

62243782
>>62243771
80%

62244081
>>62243526
>>62243621
the more fiat collapses, the higher stocks go. it's a melt-up crash in securities and a melt-down crash in fiat.
buy every dip because this is the last chopper out of nam

62244087
>>62243526
>letting emotions influence your trading strategy
lmao

62244174
>>62243653
Im in LEU not a pure uranium play but in the sector

62244891
>>62243415
they have been saying hat ever since it passed 1%
also nobody remembers 2022 when they said the same about us rates going beyond 2%
still waiting on the worse than 2008 crash

62244902
What do I do with this information
Get spooked?

62245089
Keep an ear out for what the BOJ decides to do in June and the market reaction to that. If you have investments in Japanese assets, be ready to potentially move them around. If not, then just don't care unless the Japanese economy crashes.

62245806
>>62244174
UUUU is better because it includes rare earths

62245845
>>62244891
There is some tipping point that no one exactly knows, but 4% is basically unsustainable with current debt. If you default then rates go skyhigh, if you print yen you get hyperinflation, economic collapse and the rates further spiral out of control.

item.title: You should be holding at least 1 BTC. — 97 replies — 7.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
You should be holding at least 1 BTC.

Open thread • Replies: 97 • Updated: 2026-05-18 05:34 UTC

OP

Imagine not owning at least 1 BTC before institutions and governments vacuum the remaining supply while you’re still debating if Bitcoin is a scam… or just trading crypto without considering BTC long term.

Early replies (first 3)

62219945
>>62219942
Or I can trade alts (leveraged BTC) and actually make it instead of getting a 2x pump

62219995
Fuck. I have 2BTC . Is that enough bro?

62220027
>>62219995
no, i have 3. and it's not enough, we're just poor faggots

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62233500
>>62231072
is that legit?

62233508
>>62231066
You hate woman because you like man. Gayish bitcoiner

62233709
>>62233500
Yeah anon. There’s already almost 51k BTC staked in the protocol too, which is like $4B+ worth of BTC already participating around the ecosystem.

62233716
>>62223021
You can always keep slowly adding over time anon. Most people don’t even have close to 1 BTC.

62233736
>>62224655
it will be your opportunity as well.

62233806
>>62229570
I'm from Spain and I live well. Got small biz + doing crypto + forex + stocks. Life is good.

62233821
>>62233709

62233827

buy link
buy ICP

62233835
>>62228833

62233840

62233880

62233986
>>62233821

62233993
>>62225388

62233997
>>62224679

62234000

62234021

62234248

62234899

62235825

62237090

62237423

62238430

62238954
>>62234248

62239105

62240786

62241339
>>62219942

62245258

62245282

62245390

62245405

62245425
>>62245220

62245428
>>62245220

62245553
lmao didn't know Tom Lee posted here. fuck you gook. What will be the catalyst for this exactly OP? Magic unicorn dust? arbitrary lines don't make something worth money

62245564
>>62245390

62245565
>>62245220
why does chart stop at 50k you bear fudcuck bitch bastard?

62245569
>>62245553
tom lee is my dad and he told me to tell you you're a faggot. daddy is rich and could make you his cumslave. Respect my head good nigger in charge.

62245629
>>62245553

the "catalysts" are made up after something goes up not before
it WILL go up because all you niggers think it won't
with gold it was the same
why would gold go up??? you asked
then it goes up and suddently there are 100 narratives bout it
simple as

62245660
>>62245220
